Precondition: Right end-effector grasping tennis_ball_2; box_2 top accessible; box_1 top blocked by tennis_ball_1.
Postcondition: tennis_ball_2 placed on box_2 top; left end-effector still free; tennis_ball_1 still on box_1.

Precondition: Left end-effector free; tennis_ball_1 accessible on box_1 top; green box top must be cleared.
Postcondition: Left end-effector grasping tennis_ball_1; box_1 top cleared.

Precondition: Left end-effector grasping tennis_ball_1; table top accessible; box_1 top must remain clear.
Postcondition: tennis_ball_1 placed on table; box_1 top free of objects.
